name: mcp-server-everything
description: MCP server that exercises all the features of the MCP protocol

rating.reason: The toolset shows adequate documentation with clear parameter descriptions and proper constraints, but tool descriptions are generally brief (1-2 sentences) and often lack important context about when to use each tool or what limitations exist. While names like 'echo' and 'get-sum' are clear, others like 'get-annotated-message' require more explanation of their purpose. The parameter documentation is consistently good with clear types and constraints specified.
